relationships: kab:Agtektay yezmer ad yili deg tmedyezt tatrart
kab:Tom yezmer ad yager Mary deg tazzla
kab:Ur cukkeɣ ara dakken Tom yezmer ad iɛumm
kab:Tom yezmer deg uxxam ara yili ass n letnayen
kab:Ulac ayen yezmer Tom ad t-ibeddel tura
kab:Tom yezmer tura ad yesuden Mary
kab:Yiwen n usurif amecṭuḥ yezmer ad ibeddel kra yellan
kab:Tom ur yelli yezmer ad d-yini acemma sdat medden
kab:Tella teẓra dakken yella yezmer ad yeg akk ayen umi yezmer
kab:Ulac ccek dakken yezmer i yiman-is
kab:Seg wakken meqqer armi ay yezmer ad yili d jeddi-s
